summary: Iteration 30 - FAQ and Help System Testing. All features verified: FAQ page loads without login, Tab 1 visible to all, Tab 2 shows login prompt when logged out and full content when logged in, search filtering works, hardship email template modal with copy/mail buttons, HelpTooltip on 6 elements (ticket balance, Analysis Depth, Assignment Type, AI Risk Score, Referral Program, nav), OnboardingChecklist with 5 steps and dismiss button, Help Centre link in profile dropdown and mobile menu.
passed_tests: FAQ page at /faq loads WITHOUT login - data-testid='faq-heading' shows 'Help Centre'
Tab 1 (About Simplifii) visible to logged-out users - data-testid='faq-tab-about'
Tab 2 shows login prompt when logged out - data-testid='faq-login-prompt'
Tab 2 shows full content when logged in (no login prompt)
All accordion sections expand on click - data-testid starts with 'faq-q-' (10 items in Tab 1)
Search filters questions in real time - data-testid='faq-search-input'
Search with no results shows 'No results for' message
Hardship modal opens with copy and mail buttons - data-testid='hardship-modal', 'copy-template-btn', 'open-mail-btn'
HelpTooltip next to ticket balance in nav - data-testid='help-tooltip' within credit-balance
HelpTooltip next to Analysis Depth on Brief Simplifier
HelpTooltip next to Assignment Type on Assessment Scaffolder
HelpTooltip next to AI Risk Score on Humaniser (in results view)
HelpTooltip next to Referral Program in Settings - shows 'Share this code with a friend...'
Onboarding checklist has 5 steps with checkboxes - data-testid='onboarding-step-{id}'
Help Centre link in profile dropdown - data-testid='profile-help'
Help link in mobile menu - data-testid='mobile-help-link'

FAQ_page.tab1_about: Visible to all users, 10 accordion items
FAQ_page.tab2_using: Requires login, shows login prompt when logged out
FAQ_page.hardship_modal: Opens from 'I can't afford tickets' question, has copy and mailto buttons

locations: Humaniser - AI Risk Score (in results view)

OnboardingChecklist_component.visibility: Shows for users with <3 history entries
OnboardingChecklist_component.dismiss: Saves to localStorage keyed by user_id

critical_code_review_comments: FAQ page correctly uses public route (no ProtectedRoute wrapper in App.js line 197)
HelpTooltip component uses hover for desktop and click for mobile toggle
OnboardingChecklist checks localStorage for dismissal state and API for session count
Hardship modal uses navigator.clipboard.writeText for copy and mailto: URL for email
All data-testid attributes are correctly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 complete - FAQ and Help System fully verified. Key features: (1) FAQ page at /faq is public (no auth required), has two tabs - Tab 1 visible to all, Tab 2 requires login. (2) Search filters questions in real-time. (3) Hardship email template modal works with copy and mailto buttons. (4) HelpTooltip component appears on 6 elements across the app. (5) OnboardingChecklist shows on Dashboard for new users (<3 history entries). (6) Help Centre link in profile dropdown and mobile menu. Test user: test@simplifii.com / test123.
